hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && if [ -f Makefile ]; then make test 2>&1 | tail -15; fi

python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);ti=d.get('tool_input',{});p=str(ti.get('file_path') or ti.get('path') or '');bad=('.env' in p and not p.endswith('.example'));sys.stderr.write('Blocked: real .env files are off-limits; use .env.*.example.\n') if bad else None;sys.exit(2 if bad else 0)"
